payload.label: clock
payload.long_description: Round wall-mounted clock with a glossy black fluted (scalloped) plastic or metal frame, white dial with bold dark Roman-style numerals and black hour and minute hands; the clock is slightly edge-cropped in the crop and appears photographed from about 1.2 m away.

message.content: {"label":"clock","short_description":"black fluted wall clock partial","long_description":"Round wall-mounted clock with a glossy black fluted (scalloped) plastic or metal frame, white dial with bold dark Roman-style numerals and black hour and minute hands; the clock is slightly edge-cropped in the crop and appears photographed from about 1.2 m away.","attributes":["round shape","glossy black fluted frame","white dial","dark Roman-style numerals","black hour and minute hands","wall-mounted","slightly edge-cropped","visible tilt"],"distance_from_camera_m":1.2}
